Past Projects

Real work. Real results. Right here in the Wichita area.

We're proud of every project we complete. Below you'll find a sampling of past work across our service offerings. Photos coming soon — check back for updates, or call us to see examples from your specific service area.

Featured Projects

Roofing

Wichita, KS

Full roof replacement after hail damage — completed in one day.

Painting

Derby, KS

Full exterior repaint with fresh trim color and front door accent.

Gutters

Andover, KS

Seamless gutter installation with leaf guard system.

Siding

Haysville, KS

Storm-damaged siding replacement on all four sides.

Roofing

Maize, KS

Shingle upgrade to architectural grade — improved curb appeal and warranty.

Painting

Wichita, KS

Interior whole-home paint refresh for a newly purchased home.

What Our Customers Say

"Best Top Exteriors did an incredible job on our roof. They were professional, fast, and the price was exactly what they quoted. Highly recommend!"

— Wichita Homeowner

"They painted our entire exterior and the transformation was unbelievable. Very thorough prep work and the finish looks perfect."

— Derby, KS

"Honest, hardworking, and easy to work with. They replaced our gutters quickly and even noticed a small roof issue we didn't know about."

— Andover, KS
